basic TOC with unordered list:
.
<!-- toc -->
<!-- /toc -->

# Heading 1

## Heading 2

### Heading 3
.
<!-- toc -->
<ul class="table-of-contents">
<li><a href="#heading-1">Heading 1</a><ul>
<li><a href="#heading-2">Heading 2</a><ul>
<li><a href="#heading-3">Heading 3</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

<!-- /toc -->
<h1 id="heading-1">Heading 1</h1>
<h2 id="heading-2">Heading 2</h2>
<h3 id="heading-3">Heading 3</h3>
.

no TOC markers - no change:
.
# Heading 1

## Heading 2
.
<h1>Heading 1</h1>
<h2>Heading 2</h2>
.

TOC with content between markers - should be replaced:
.
<!-- toc -->
old content that should be replaced
<!-- /toc -->

# Hello

## World
.
<!-- toc -->
<ul class="table-of-contents">
<li><a href="#hello">Hello</a><ul>
<li><a href="#world">World</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

<!-- /toc -->
<h1 id="hello">Hello</h1>
<h2 id="world">World</h2>
.

duplicate headings - should have unique slugs:
.
<!-- toc -->
<!-- /toc -->

# Title

## Section

# Title

## Section
.
<!-- toc -->
<ul class="table-of-contents">
<li><a href="#title">Title</a><ul>
<li><a href="#section">Section</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li><a href="#title-1">Title</a><ul>
<li><a href="#section-1">Section</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

<!-- /toc -->
<h1 id="title">Title</h1>
<h2 id="section">Section</h2>
<h1 id="title-1">Title</h1>
<h2 id="section-1">Section</h2>
.

empty TOC - no headings:
.
<!-- toc -->
<!-- /toc -->

Some text here.
.
<!-- toc -->
<!-- /toc -->
<p>Some text here.</p>
.

TOC with Chinese characters:
.
<!-- toc -->
<!-- /toc -->

# 标题一

## 小节一
.
<!-- toc -->
<ul class="table-of-contents">
<li><a href="#标题一">标题一</a><ul>
<li><a href="#小节一">小节一</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

<!-- /toc -->
<h1 id="标题一">标题一</h1>
<h2 id="小节一">小节一</h2>
.

headings with special characters:
.
<!-- toc -->
<!-- /toc -->

# Hello & Goodbye

## What's up?
.
<!-- toc -->
<ul class="table-of-contents">
<li><a href="#hello--goodbye">Hello &amp; Goodbye</a><ul>
<li><a href="#whats-up">What's up?</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>

<!-- /toc -->
<h1 id="hello--goodbye">Hello &amp; Goodbye</h1>
<h2 id="whats-up">What's up?</h2>
.

TOC not at beginning:
.
Some intro text.

<!-- toc -->
<!-- /toc -->

# First

# Second
.
<p>Some intro text.</p>
<!-- toc -->
<ul class="table-of-contents">
<li><a href="#first">First</a></li>
<li><a href="#second">Second</a></li>
</ul>

<!-- /toc -->
<h1 id="first">First</h1>
<h1 id="second">Second</h1>
.
